title: Reduce costly branch mispredictions
description: Turn unpredictable data-dependent branches in hot loops into branchless or well-predicted forms when the mispredict penalty dominates.
body: Use when perf shows a high branch-mispredict rate in an inner loop with data-dependent control flow. Do not blindly remove branches that the predictor already handles well (loop counters, rarely-taken errors). Actions: measure the mispredict rate, then convert the offending branch to a branchless select / cmov / table lookup, or sort/partition data so the branch becomes predictable. Validation signals include a lower mispredict count under perf stat and improved cycles on representative data. Risk boundary: branchless code can be slower if the branch was predictable, and can hurt readability; require a counter-backed before/after, and revert if IPC does not improve.
